Aww, thanks for the review and message! We have had a lot of difficulties going on in life for a while so we haven’t been able to update. But rest assured we have a ton in progress and plan to get back to it as soon as possible!

If you have discord you can join to stay in the loop. We haven’t been able to be as active lately there but when we can get back to it we love interacting with you guys so much! Discord.gg/SquidSmack

reviews.review_description: So my brother was telling me about this app and so I got it but after playing for like 10 minutes I went to play VRChat and when I loaded on a world it would kick me out, s then I uninstalled the game and it kinda helped but VRChat was still lagging, so I uninstalled and reinstalled vr chat and it’s still not working. I have nothing against this game I’m just warning you that just in case :/

developer_response.body:
That shouldn't be possible for one game to crash another. Maybe look into VR Chat crashes? It sounds like many people have trouble with this. Here is some info VR Chat gives to help solve it: https://help.vrchat.com/hc/en-us/articles/1500002247921-VRChat-keeps-crashing-or-has-issues-launching-properly

Hope that helps!

You could join the discord and ask our swim instructors for tips on swimming and other game tips so you can't get things stolen as easily and know how to find the rare treasure easier! discord.gg/squidsmack

developer_response.body:
Update: We smoothed the swimming locomotion in a recent update. :)
Cool you love our game! Thanks for dropping by to say let us know. The movement does have a bit of a learning curve and certainly has room for improvement, which we're working on! The best way to think about it is that you are swimming in water and suctioning to surfaces, so tiptoe more than bound or you will unstick. We also have lots of ideas for later updates and are working on it full time! :)

reviews.review_description: It’s boring and toxic kids

developer_response.body: Hi there! Sorry you ran into toxic kids. We are working on a reporting system and a switch to mute all players. For now you can report on our discord - link in the game description. There are also lots of nice people in the community.

reviews.review_description:
GRAPHICS:

10/10 I love the models because of how funny looking they are and I love the art style for this game. None of the textures are bugged or sloppy and everything just looks polished and smooth.

UI INTERFACE:

The menu has all of the settings you would basically need for a silly squid game. The only problem that I have is when I go into the game smooth turning is off even though I turned it on. I would say overall the interface is 9/10

MECHANICS:

When I first made this review, the swimming and cloaking was a little off. But now, the swimming and the cloaking has been improved significantly. When you swim, you feel more like you're actually in water instead of moving so inconsistently.

As for cloaking I will say it has gotten better. The sharks dont go straight towards you but instead they get confused and eventually find you after a while.

 Overall 9/10

CUSTOMIZATION:

8/10 Honestly it could be better. There could be more options for what you want your character to look like. If I wanted to have an shark tooth eyepatch and a shrimp on my head i couldn't do that. You can have a variety of different colors such as green, blue, yellow, black, and so on but the ink should be more customizable in my opinion because there isn't any other option except color. It would be cool if you added a pattern the ink can come out in or what shape I can be but the customization is fine for now.

PLAYIBILITY:

Some people come into the game not really knowing how to operate things. To be fair, the tutorial doesn't really explain anything other than how to swim. In my opinion the tutorial should give you instructions on how to use starfish, and what the pearls and collectables do. There is instructions on what controls to use and what they do but when I first got the game I basically had to learn on my own on what to do.

Anyways, the game is great but it could be greater. If you're reading this for the first time I hoped that I helped you in some way. This is TSG and im out.

THANK YOU FOR THE GAME : )

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review TSG! This is great and really thought out! :) It's a good suggestion, we should work on some things that help you know all you can do in the game. We're working on it every day and hope to add more features and improvements constantly!

reviews.review_description: It just keeps you on a loading screen I don’t get why if I’m doing something wrong please can someone please help

developer_response.body: We had some people if they have a period at the end of their oculus name or strange characters it can cause you not to get in. We just discovered this, we hope to have that fixed in a week or two, or if you don't mind changing your oculus name you could get in. Is there any red text?

reviews.review_description: I’m not gonna do one of those stupid copy and paste reviews because they aren’t actual reviews just someone stating how they feel about the game without words, but this game has really good potential and I’m not gonna tell you how to make your game because of 3 things. Number one, I’m not a dev so I have no right to tell you how to make your game, number 2, I understand how annoying it is to have people just make suggestions for the game and have it be the worst idea ever. And finally number 3, I understand that it just came out and it’s in app lab but please whatever you do with developing this game further; change something with the movement style, it is super janky to open the chests or clams because I get flung anytime I move my arms and trying to get into a cannon is like trying to find a needle in a haystack. I had a crap ton of fun playing this game but Im sure that I can have more fun if it is tweaked a little bit.

developer_response.body:
Update: We have improved the chest/clam/cannon interactions, and also did some improvements to the swimming locomotion so it is smoother now since August 1st!_____

Hey there, thanks for the review, cool you had fun! Thanks for understanding we're new and early access! We will definitely be polishing interactions. As far as swimming, it helps to pretend you're in water and move more gently. And on surfaces, lightly suction and tiptoe. We're working on the game constantly and hopefully you'll see improvements in each update. Thanks for playing!

reviews.review_description: Tbh i play gtag a lot and i even say this is funner bc u can smack ppl AND its brand new so u can que up a game without a s**t ton of people screaming slurs at u(if u couldnt tell i was refering to gtag bc that’s literally what every lobby is like) but can u make the map a little bigger tho?

developer_response.body: That's cool! We love the people we meet in the SS community. They mostly seem nice. :) We want to make more maps for sure and maybe a bigger one in the future.

reviews.review_description:
You are squid, spawn, find other squid, learn to swim, go into shipwreck tunnel.
Swimming is with only two arms so it takes a moment to get used to. 
Ink is on B 
Mute Mic is on A
Suction cup hands hold lightly to surfaces. 
There's more but I haven't gotten that far....shark ate me.
You are squid.
My camouflage is not working

developer_response.body: Did it get stuck camouflaged? That is an occasional bug we do know about. To cloak you put your LEFT hand on the surface you want to turn into and touch the LEFT thumbstick. Sorry if you already knew that, but just in case. :) Also if you want to give more input/bug reports you can join the  discord: https://discord.com/invite/Mv94EeNaxu

reviews.review_description: The game is good but when your riding on the manatee it glitches you out the map after 20 minutes or so and when two players grab an item it glitches you out of the map please fix this or only let one person grab an item

developer_response.body:
Update: We fixed it so that if you get flung out of the map it should put you back. Thanks for the bug report!

Hi there, thanks for the review! Yes we know about these bugs. We've set up some items to only let one person grab them, but haven't gotten to fixing everything yet. The game is brand new and we're working on it all the time! We'll look into why it would glitch you out of the map either way.

developer_response.body: Most of the people who play are actually pretty nice! Sorry you ran into some mean ones. The golden squid has become quite a popular treasure that people fight for, but sometimes they work together to help get them. We do have a reporting system, but we only let moderators report to avoid false reports. If you want to be more a part of the community you can join the discord too https://discord.com/invite/Mv94EeNaxu
